narrative_text: On the front porch, the dog jumps at the wagon and knocks it down the steps. The wagon rolls down the steep street with all the cookies. The grandmother looks surprised. The boy watches the wagon speed away.
scene_description: The boy and his dog venture outside, heading down a winding cobblestone path to deliver their treats. Bright morning light illuminates the scene, catching the glossy red paint of the wagon and the soft fur of a curious squirrel sitting on a garden gate. The atmosphere is energetic and sunny, filled with the promise of a successful adventure.

properties.distinctive_features: thick brown curly hair and bright eyes

entities.pose: tilting forward slightly as it is pulled along the path

entities.pose: trotting with head held high and ears bouncing

properties.distinctive_features: dark chocolate chips visible on the surface

entities.pose: nestled inside a wicker basket with a white cloth covering

properties.distinctive_features: very bushy tail and large black eyes

entities.pose: sitting upright with paws tucked against its chest

title: The Escape
